title: Decision Notice on the Authorization of Satellite Direct-to-Device Services
summary: Establishes the regulatory and spectrum framework for D2D services, allowing licensed mobile network operators to provide satellite direct-to-device services with TRA-approved satellite operators under licensing, spectrum, coordination, non-interference, record-keeping, and operator cooperation conditions.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.iot_connected_devices: Authorises satellite direct-to-device services in Bahrain.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.spectrum: Authorises satellite direct-to-device services in Bahrain.

notes: Related instruments: Consultation Paper on the authorisation of Satellite Direct-to-Device services, National Frequency Plan 2024, Individual Mobile Telecommunications Licence
